title: Citrusy Tender Lazy-Sunday Kenyan Banana Stir-fry
description: A Mediterranean-friendly, citrusy, tender dish featuring banana in a lazy Sunday style, perfect for a quick and easy meal.

ingredients.name: Garlic cloves
ingredients.notes: Minced to add flavor and aroma

ingredients.name: Sour oranges or lemons
ingredients.notes: Citrus enhances the dish but optional for a milder version

ingredients.name: Herbs (optional)
ingredients.amount: A few sprigs of fresh basil or mint, finely chopped

instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Add chopped onions and sauté until translucent, about 2 minutes.
Add minced garlic and stir for an additional minute until fragrant.
Gently add sliced bananas into the skillet. Cook them for about 5-7 minutes, stirring occasionally to prevent sticking.
If using, add chopped peanuts and cook for another minute until they become golden brown.
Drizzle the citrus juice over the dish and stir well to evenly distribute flavor.
Season with salt to taste. If desired, sprinkle fresh herbs on top just before serving.
Serve hot as a side or main course.
